nasb.text: They came to Ephesus, and he left them there. Now he himself entered the synagogue and reasoned with the Jews.

esv.text: And they came to Ephesus, and he left them there, but he himself went into the synagogue and reasoned with the Jews.

cnv.text: 到了以弗所，保羅留他們在那裡，自己卻到會堂去，跟猶太人辯論。

ccb.text: 到了以弗所，保罗离开亚居拉夫妇，独自进入会堂跟犹太人辩论。

csbs.text: 他们到达以弗所城，保罗把他们两个人留在那里，自己就进了会堂向犹太人讲论。
